concepts.finding:
For the sponsored search market, the tradi-
tional metrics such as cost-per-click, ad clicks are very indirect for
performance advertisers to control and optimize their conversions
and ROI, and the keyword-level bidding optimization is inefficient
for increasing the advertising performance.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
Secondly, in the pay-per-click pricing model, since the keyword
bids play a direct role in the ranking and pricing of ads, advertis-
ers should bid on each keyword cautiously.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
Thirdly, the creation of search advertising plays an important role
in ad performance, especially impacts the click-through rate(CTR)
of ad.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
As plenty of keywords
should be maintained and highly dynamic and competitive auction
environment, the keyword-level bidding language is very inefficient
and brings great challenges to manual bidding optimization.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Based on the pay-per-click pricing model and the keyword
targeting technology, the sponsored system runs online auctions
to determine the allocations and prices of search advertisements.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
We present the
overall architecture and modeling techniques for each module of
the system and share our lessons learned in solving several key chal-
lenges.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Finally, online A/B test and long-term grouping experiment
demonstrate the advancement and effectiveness of this system.
concepts.implication: Applicable to user/item clustering for personalization

concepts.finding:
Traditionally, the pay-per-click pricing model and the keyword
targeting technology are the two keys to the business success of
sponsored search.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
Firstly, keyword targeting requires that the advertiser should
select plentiful keywords relevant to their business to increase the
coverage of related and targeted search traffic.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
Though the
sponsored system has provided some keyword recommendation
tools and multiple match types such as exact, phrase and broad and
so on, but the keywords and match type set by advertisers still play
an important role in ad retrieval, and all the retrieved ads should be

concepts.finding:
Massive search traffic and highly dynamic search intents pose huge
challenges for advertisers in their manual selection of keywords.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
In
this situation, the keywords selected manually by advertisers deter-
mine the upper-bound of commercial search volumes, sponsored
search engines cannot achieve the actual global optimal matching
between search queries and ads, the advertiser also cannot get suf-
ficient ad impressions if he doesn
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
Due to the trade-off
between usability and pertinency, most of the sponsored search sys-
tems adopt the keyword-level bidding language, and advertiser sets
the bid price for keyword to represent his/her willingness to pay
based on the click value of this keyword.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
Advertisers from big
businesses usually recruit search engine marketing(SEM) experts
to optimize their campaigns, while maintaining plenty of keywords
and their bidding optimization is non-trivial especially for small
and local businesses that donâĂŹt have dedicated marketing staff.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
Moreover, keyword-level bidding language is too coarse-grained
to represent the real value of each search traffic, it only can give
an average click value for a cluster of the search volume.
concepts.implication: Applicable to user/item clustering for personalization

concepts.finding:
Even for
the same search keyword, different time or different locations or
different users may generate different click values for advertisers.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
To address these main challenges in sponsored search, we pro-
pose and build an automated and intelligent advertising system,
called AiAds.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization
concepts.open_question:
How to address the limitation described: To address these main challenges in sponsored search, we pro-
pose and build an automated and intelligent advertising system,
called AiAds.

concepts.finding:
The main
contributions of this work are as follows:
• We present a straightforward bidding language and corre-
sponding automated bidding strategy for advertisers to op-
timize their campaign performance directly.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
• We conduct the online A/B test and long-term grouping
experiment on live traffic of Baidu, all results show that
the AiAds system can significantly increase the advertising
performance, increase the revenue of the search engine and
increase the user experience.
concepts.implication: Applicable to user/item clustering for personalization
